title: Bridge Essay: Superior emotional regulating effects of creative cognitive reappraisal.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Knowledge/Gnosis** (Phase 14) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Knowledge/Gnosis to mechanistic neuroscience through Superior, emotional, regulating, effects, of.

**Superior emotional regulating effects of creative cognitive reappraisal.** — Neuroimage. PMID: 31254647. DOI: 10.1016/j.neuroimage.2019.06.061. Although the effects of cognitive reappraisal in regulating negative emotion are generally well documented, its regulatory effects are usually not very strong because the ordinary reappraisals employed in previous studies were insufficient to overcome the mental set or response bias toward negative situations. In this study, we developed anew strategy employing creative reappraisals that provides an insightful reinterpretation of the negative stimulus. We believe this approach, through adopting
